statement: In every magma, Equation 2139 (`x = ((y * y) * y) * (y * z)`) implies Equation 3660 (`x * x = (x * x) * (x * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0943
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y y) y) (op y z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op (op x x) (op x y))
